name: tesshari-foundry
description: Build tooling for the Tesshari Foundry VTT system (compendium pipeline).

scripts.pack:cards: fvtt package pack cards --id tesshari --type System --in packs-src/cards --out packs
scripts.pack:items: fvtt package pack items --id tesshari --type System --in packs-src/items --out packs
scripts.pack:races: fvtt package pack races --id tesshari --type System --in packs-src/races --out packs
scripts.pack:classes: fvtt package pack classes --id tesshari --type System --in packs-src/classes --out packs
scripts.pack:subclasses: fvtt package pack subclasses --id tesshari --type System --in packs-src/subclasses --out packs
scripts.pack:all: npm run pack:cards && npm run pack:items && npm run pack:races && npm run pack:classes && npm run pack:subclasses
scripts.all: npm run build-packs && npm run pack:all
